# Voice Samples

Target size: 700-1,300 words. Hard max: 1,700 words unless explicitly requested.

## Status

- Source status: user_provided | generated_from_intake | mixed
- Confidence: high | medium | low
- Enrichment needed:

## Sample Index

Keep 5-8 gold-standard samples by default. Use 9-10 only when the creator has materially different modes. Mark generated samples clearly and replace them with real published or user-written examples over time.

## Sample: <source type> - <context>

> Exact sentence, caption, reply, story frame, script line, or newsletter line.

- Voice signal:
